title: Winter drive for animals in need
description: GEORGE NEWS - Have you visited Rocket at 27...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Have you visited Rocket at 27 Arbour Road? If not, now is the perfect time to pop in and support their Winter Drive for animals in need.


> Rocket is collecting donations to help care for animals during the harsh winter months. You can contribute by bringing a tin or bag of food, a blanket, or even making a cash donation.


As a token of appreciation, each donation enters you into a draw to win a R500 meal experience at Rocket. The draw will take place on 14 July, so please hurry and make your contribution soon.

For more information, please contact

Odin on 072 084 1374. Let's come together and support our furry friends this winter!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
